sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνώτερος

- Transliteration: Anoteros

- Phonetic: an-o'-ter-os

- Definition:

1. higher

a. of motion: to a higher place, up higher

b. of rest: in a higher place, above

- Origin: comparative degree of G507

- TDNT entry: 1:376,*

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective Neuter

- Strong's: Comparative degree of G507; upper that is (neuter as adverb) to a more conspicuous place in a former part of the book: - above higher.
